name: Changyou Alliance Group Limited
summary: Changyou Alliance Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the digital points business in the People's Republic of China. The company operates an electronic platform to facilitate awards earned by customers of loyalty programs of other companies to be exchanged in the form of virtual assets and credits for consumption of merchandises, games, entertainment, financial services, and other commercial transactions. It also sells and purchases merchandise on the Changyou platform, which include physical goods and virtual assets, such as electronic gift cards and coupons. In addition, the company provides financial services comprising points consumption and cashier output services, as well as QR code payment services with special merchants and UnionPay merchants; and insurance, funds, wealth management, and smart investment advisory services. The company was formerly known as Fortunet e-Commerce Group Limited and changed its name to Changyou Alliance Group Limited in June 2020. Changyou Alliance Group Limited was founded in 2001 and is based in Wan Chai, Hong Kong.
